title: Sampling / Inference Pipeline

steps: [BRANCH] If target_index_manual is None AND start_idx set → build range list
[BRANCH] If target_index_manual is a list (batch bullet-time mode):
→ Cache returned transformer, vae, distributed_state, ckpt_path in kwargs (model reuse)
[ELSE] Single bullet-time or static: Call main_single(config, **kwargs)

activities.function: main_single(config, seed, transformer, vae, distributed_state, ckpt_path)
steps: Set weight_dtype = bfloat16, init Generator, seed_everything(seed)
Load / merge main_config via OmegaConf.load or load_and_merge_configs
→ If ckpt_path None and config.ckpt_path None: get_most_recent_checkpoint(ckpts_path)
Extract ckpt_name from path via regex (checkpoint-N pattern)
Append ckpt_name / dataset_name / bullet_time index to outdir
[GUARD] Raise ValueError if ckpt file not found
Apply config overrides to main_config (set_manual_time_idx, static_view_indices_fixed, target_index_subsample, num_test_images, use_depth, data_mode)
[BRANCH] If transformer/vae/distributed_state are None: load_model(ckpt_path, main_config, weight_dtype)
Create output dirs: outdir, raw, meta, grid, full_output, main_gaussians_renderings
[SKIP] If meta JSON already exists and skip_existing → continue
[SKIP] If do_eval and all view mp4 files exist and skip_existing → continue
Move tensors to device, cast to weight_dtype
[COND] rgb_latents already in batch → use directly; else encode_multi_view_video(vae, video, ...)
Rearrange pred_images_views: 'b (v t) c h w → v b t c h w'
Build images_grid_list: pred_images + optional gt_images + optional video_norm + pred_depths + optional gt_depths

key_decisions: Batch vs single bullet-time: list vs scalar target_index_manual
Model reuse across bullet-time iterations (kwargs caching)
Checkpoint resolution: auto-detect most recent vs explicit path
Pre-encoded latents (rgb_latents key) vs on-the-fly VAE encoding
Plucker embeddings: precomputed CPU vs on-the-fly CUDA
Eval mode vs visualization mode (do_eval flag): controls all output save flags
Skip-existing gate for both meta JSON and per-view mp4
Grid accumulation: flush when step_test_sum >= num_grid_samples
key_dependencies: main_single → get_multi_dataloader, load_model, encode_multi_view_video, encode_latent_time_vae, encode_plucker_vae
main_single → create_depth_visu, generate_wave_video, save_video, save_ply, save_ply_orig, write_dict_to_json
important_notes: Model runs in bfloat16; plucker computed in float64 then cast. batch_size forced to 1 for inference. Model weights frozen (eval + no_grad). Distributed via HuggingFace Accelerate PartialState.
